name: Whitey bay
description:
Requested character sorry if she isn't perfect but there is literally no info on her on wikipedia and the request i got was very lacking in detail but i tried my best with what i had i will be working on the ace and ginrummy requests now

I made it so she is in her younger years, like in her twenties and sorry it's not my best work.
